subcodes.first_line: O Sabz-'Alí! God willing, mayest thou be illumined and radiant through the effulgent rays of the Sun of certitude, and by the Name All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سبز علی انشاء الله از اشراقات انوار آفتاب یقین منیر و روشن باشی و باسم قدیر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to the people of the world
